methods.description: Process for calculating areal extents of classes in the Siberian Yedoma region using GIS software and various geospatial datasets.

steps.description: The extent of the Siberian Yedoma region was digitised from Grosse et al. (2013) and, where applicable, snapped to correspond to the Arctic Ocean coastlines of the NCSCDv2 (Hugelius et al., 2013b).
steps.searchable_summary: Digitize and align Siberian Yedoma region extent with Arctic Ocean coastlines using NCSCDv2 data

steps.description: Soil and nonsoil coverage within this region in the NCSCDv2 was extracted.
steps.searchable_summary: Extract soil and nonsoil coverage data from NCSCDv2 for Siberian Yedoma region

steps.description: To provide estimates of mapped coverage of peatlands and wetlands for the Siberian Yedoma region which can be considered as independent from the NCSCD the following international geospatial datasets were used: Nilsson et al. (2002); Bartalev et al. (2003); Lehner and Döll (2004) and Arino et al. (2012).
steps.searchable_summary: Use international geospatial datasets to estimate peatlands and wetlands coverage in Siberian Yedoma region

steps.description: The thematic classes that corresponded to peatlands were identified and their respective coverage in the Siberian Yedoma region quantified.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify and quantify peatlands thematic classes in Siberian Yedoma region

methods.description: Classification and sampling of independent field validation sites using a transect-based semi-random approach.

steps.description: The independent field validation sites were classified and sampled using a transect-based semi-random approach during field campaigns in August (2010 and 2013).
steps.searchable_summary: Classify and sample field validation sites using transect-based semi-random approach

steps.description: The starting point and direction of transects were chosen to cut across representative landscape types.
steps.searchable_summary: Select transect starting points and directions to cover representative landscapes
